mid_market_tooltip: The mid-market rate is the midpoint between buy and sell prices for a currency pair. No provider offers this rate — but the closer they get, the better the deal for you.

about_hero: Your trusted comparison platform for financial products in the UAE
about_mission: SmartMoney UAE helps millions of expats and UAE residents make smarter financial decisions. We compare remittance rates, credit cards, loans, insurance, and more — so you don't have to visit 20 different websites.
about_why_1: Live rates updated every 15 minutes — not stale data from last week
about_why_2: AI-powered advisor that understands your financial situation
about_why_3: Built specifically for South Asian expats in the UAE
about_why_4: 100% free and unbiased — we earn from referrals, not from you
about_team: We're a team of fintech enthusiasts and UAE residents who were frustrated by the lack of transparent financial comparison tools in the Middle East. SmartMoney UAE was built to solve that problem.
contact_subtitle: Have questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries? We'd love to hear from you.
contact_success: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
footer_desc: The UAE's smartest financial comparison platform. Compare and save on remittance, credit cards, loans, and insurance.
footer_disclaimer: Rates are indicative. Always confirm with the provider before transferring.
